titleEn: McHutchison Adds New Southern California Sales Representative
summaryZh: McHutchison公司宣布任命Don Golema为南加州销售代表。Golema在精准农业和新兴技术领域拥有超过十年的业务发展和企业客户管理经验，此前曾在飞利浦照明和Signify支持园艺照明领域，与种植者和行业伙伴合作推进创新解决方案。他将常驻加州圣巴巴拉，负责南加州地区的销售工作。
featuredReason: 该新闻涉及精准农业领域的人才流动，但主要聚焦于园艺照明和销售岗位，与智慧畜牧（养殖业）的核心技术应用关联度较低，仅作为行业动态参考。
contentFull: By Greenhouse Grower staff|July 2, 2026 Southern California Sales Representative Don Golema. | McHutchison McHutchison has added Don Golema as its new Southern California sales representative. Golema has more than a decade of experience in business development and enterprise account management across the precision agriculture and emerging technology sectors. Most recently, Golema supported the horticulture lighting segment with Philips Lighting and Signify, where he worked closely with growers and industry partners to advance innovative solutions for horticulture production. “What stands out the most about Don is his authentic and engaging approach to business,” says Ken Turrentine, President of McHutchison. “He is known for building strong relationships, leading with integrity, and maintaining a genuine curiosity about both customers and the industry. His collaborative style and passion for horticulture make him an excellent addition to our team.” Golema recently started with the company, although many people in the horticultural industry have already met him, as the McHutchison team just toured numerous southern gardens in Alabama, Georgia, and North Carolina. The trip allowed him the opportunity to meet vendors, learn the business, and get acquainted with many customers and team members right away. Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More 4 Events You Won’t Want to Miss at Cultivate’26 Golema is a graduate of Southern Illinois University at Carbondale, where he earned a bachelor’s degree in project management. Working at McHutchison, he will be based in Santa Barbara, CA. 1 1 5 McHutchison Adds New Southern California Sales Representative Subscribe to eNewsletter Subscribe
translationZh:
McHutchison已任命Don Golema为其新的南加州销售代表。Golema在精准农业和新兴技术领域的业务发展和企业客户管理方面拥有超过十年的经验。最近，Golema在飞利浦照明和Signify支持园艺照明领域，与种植者和行业伙伴密切合作，推进园艺生产的创新解决方案。

“Don最突出的是他真实且引人入胜的商务方式，”McHutchison总裁Ken Turrentine表示。“他以建立牢固关系、诚信领导以及对客户和行业保持真正的好奇心而闻名。他的协作风格和对园艺的热情使他成为我们团队的优秀补充。”

Golema最近刚加入公司，但园艺行业的许多人已经见过他，因为McHutchison团队刚刚参观了阿拉巴马州、佐治亚州和北卡罗来纳州的多个南方花园。这次旅行让他有机会会见供应商、学习业务，并立即熟悉许多客户和团队成员。

Golema毕业于南伊利诺伊大学卡本代尔分校，获得项目管理学士学位。在McHutchison工作期间，他将常驻加州圣巴巴拉。
author: nmatysik
contentHtml:
Before joining McHutchison, Don Golema worked in the horticulture lighting sector through Philips Lighting and Signify.
The post McHutchison Adds New Southern California Sales Representative appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
